Two "+ Add Employer" style sections that carelessly reuse the same radio `name`

A dynamic form generator that doesn't uniquify field names per repeated block is a real pattern on some ATSes. The root bug: afjCollectFields used to dedupe radio groups by name ALONE across the whole page, so only the FIRST section's group was ever collected at all — the second was entirely invisible to matching/filling/learning. Using two separate <form> elements here (native radio grouping is scoped per form-owner) isolates that from an unrelated, unfixable-by-us browser behavior: same-name radios sharing one form are natively one group regardless of our JS, so this fixture deliberately avoids that confound.

Employer 1: Are you currently employed here?
Employer 2: Are you currently employed here? 
running…
